signals.headline: Federal court halts Trump White House ballroom construction, blocking King Charles visit | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Federal court halts Trump White House ballroom construction, blocking King Charles visit | NO | HIGH confidence**  
A US federal court has halted construction on the new White House ballroom, preventing King Charles from visiting it during his confirmed three-day US trip at the end of April 2026, amid tensions with Trump[1].

signals.headline: Russia Launches Deadliest Attack on Ukraine Since 2026 Began | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia Launches Deadliest Attack on Ukraine Since 2026 Began | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Russia conducted its most lethal strikes of the year overnight on April 16, 2026, launching nearly 700 drones and 19 ballistic missiles targeting Kyiv and other cities, killing at least 16 people including a 12-year-old boy in the capital and forcing evacuations.[1]
